name: Ready Lab — hold an action for a trigger (D-ACT-1)
description: Bench for the Ready action. Open the radial Tactics popup and pick Ready: stage 1 chooses which action to hold (an attack or a single-target save spell), stage 2 chooses the trigger. Then end your turn and watch it release. Best tests: with Thorin, Ready his attack 'When an enemy enters my reach' and let a goblin charge in (the spear-brace) — or 'When an enemy attacks' and counterpunch the first goblin that swings. With Elara, Ready Fire Bolt or a save spell on the same triggers. Enemies start a few hexes out so they approach (MOVES / ENTERS_RANGE) then attack (ATTACKS). Note: enemy AI rarely casts, so the 'casts a spell' trigger is hard to see live — it's covered by tests. Readied spells spend their slot only when they actually release.
